verses.text: God bids appoint the cities of refuge. Refuge. Mercy is provided.
God bids appoint the cities of refuge. Refuge. Mercy is provided.
God bids appoint the cities of refuge. Refuge. Mercy is provided.
The slayer flees there till judgment or the high priest's death. The slayer. The innocent are sheltered.
The slayer flees there till judgment or the high priest's death. The slayer. The innocent are sheltered.
The slayer flees there till judgment or the high priest's death. The slayer. The innocent are sheltered.
Six cities are named on both sides of Jordan. Six cities. Mercy reaches all.
Six cities are named on both sides of Jordan. Six cities. Mercy reaches all.
Six cities are named on both sides of Jordan. Six cities. Mercy reaches all.
